name: wikidata_entity_value
description: This object represents the actual value in a statement or qualifier

content.description: String representation of the value. If the value is too complex to represent as a string or integer, this will be replaced by statements.PID.value.content_data

type.description: The actual data type of the value for this property. Should match statements.PID.property.data_type, but might not.

content_data.description: An object holding the representation of the value. If the value can be represented simply as a string or integer, this will be replaced by statements.PID.value.content
